name: Vohuman Cafe - Sahapedia
snippet:
Vohuman started as a chai (tea) shop, and today is an extremely popular destination for Irani chai and omelettes in the city.
Over the years, Vohuman has cemented its place as an important part of Pune’s culinary heritage. Irani attributed its success to his father’s hard work, good food, the IT boom, and a little bit of luck. When Vohuman Cafe began, it was located in a corner near Jahangir Hospital.

name: The Cheesy Choice of Pune - Vohuman Cafe
snippet: On The Independence Day of India, in 1978, A parsee gentleman started a small hotel in a nondescript location near the compound of Jehangir Nursing Home. His name was Hormuz Irani. Never would he have thought that his less than modest eatery serving bun maska, omelettes, and other egg preparations,would turn into a posh and thriving restaurant.
